title: Deputy Crane's Annotated Route Map
description: Visible on the side table in the sheriff's office: Crane's working map of Erie County with two pencil lines drawn north from the Huron Road junction. One line follows the main shore road — the correct route. The second line follows the old wagon track through the Voss farm property, which Crane has marked with a question mark. He does not know about the barn station, but he has drawn a line within a hundred yards of it based on the road geography alone. If Thomas Cole's phantomed misdirection fails, Crane's fallback route will take him directly past the barn.
